result: {"steelman":"This proposal directly addresses a real pain point — manual tagging doesn't scale. By leveraging existing VaultWatcher infrastructure, implementation cost is low.","red_team":"Local LLM tag quality is unreliable for nuanced categorization. The system adds complexity to an already-working manual workflow.","synthesis":"The core idea is sound but should start conservative: high confidence threshold (0.9+), append-only tags, and a simple accept/reject UI.","confidence":0.72}
